data.content:
Now I have the full picture. Let me create the `Directory.Packages.props` and update all project files.

**Conflicts resolved (highest version wins):**
- `System.Text.Json`: 10.0.1 vs 8.0.4 → **10.0.1**
- `Azure.Identity`: 1.13.2 vs 1.11.4 → **1.13.2**

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have all the information. Let me identify the packages and their versions across all projects:

| Package | Api | Worker | Shared | Tests |
|---------|-----|--------|--------|-------|
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 | 8.0.4 | 10.0.1 | 10.0.1 |
| Azure.Identity | 1.13.2 | - | 1.11.4 | - |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | - | 8.0.1 | - | - |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | - | 1.15.0 | - | - |


| xunit | - | - | - | 2.9.3 |

I've spotted the version conflicts: System.Text.Json has 10.0.1 and 8.0.4 across projects, so I'll standardize on 10.0.1, and Azure.Identity ranges from 1.11.4 to 1.13.2, so I'll use the newer 1.13.2. To implement centralized package management, I need to create a Directory.Packages.props file with centralized version declarations and then strip the Version attributes from all the individual project files.

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
